horoscope: You’re absorbing a tremendous amount from your environment simply by stepping back and observing more than usual, dear Aries. You're building your confidence. Wrapping up projects, organizing, and family affairs are in positive focus. Early today, desires can come on strongly, and it makes sense to sort out which ones are pure and those that are more likely to lead you off the path. Keep in mind that bigger isn't always better, and entertain the idea that some of your simpler desires may, in fact, satisfy you more in the long run. Enthusiasm runs very high, but watch that you don't burn out by taking on too much with a New Moon occurring in your sign in two days. There can be super ideas emerging today, and wonderful lessons to learn about yourself and your needs. In the week ahead, transits are showcasing your special qualities. It's a time when your talents and natural savvy are on display. A little appreciation from others can go a long way toward your self-improvement efforts. You are doing your own thing now, and people more readily see your value and worth. You're connecting with what you truly want from your life and where improvements can be made, particularly with how you approach the world, take the lead, and present yourself.

Early today, transits are stirring up creative energy, dear Taurus, but it may be a little difficult to know where to direct it. Remembering that happiness comes from your own making is important now, because putting high expectations on others is not only hard on them, it's ultimately hard on you. Timing may be off. However, the day can be rewarding and revealing if you aim to entertain big ideas and unusual pleasures, but keep things real. This comes more naturally as the day advances, and you're considering the long term and how you might take steps that support a more secure and happy future. You’re bringing more structure to recent ideas, and some of the plans you develop now can be especially helpful and powerful in the future. Be on the lookout for opportunities arising through learning endeavors, classmates, friends, networking, and group endeavors. As we approach the Sun and Chiron's annual alignment, you get a window into your vulnerabilities. It can be a time of recognizing what needs to be released to move forward, or of a new understanding of a problem. The light shines on aspects of your personality and life that you may not typically see or confront, and your intuition is strong. Even if uncomfortable elements are involved in this process, aim to make the most of this time. Something you hear or someone you meet by chance can stir up feelings, thoughts, and ideas that ultimately lead you in new directions.

Creative energy is stirring today, dear Gemini, but tapping into it requires some thought and self-understanding. Desires that come on suddenly and powerfully early today may mask true wants, and it's best not to fool yourself into thinking that satisfying a sudden whim will truly improve your life. Find ways to enjoy different experiences and pleasures, and remind yourself that happiness is not some elusive thing outside of yourself that you're supposed to chase -- it starts within. Fortunately, as the day advances, good energy is with you to bring more structure to your life without compromising your need to address your inner needs. You’re balancing optimism with realism. At the same time, your interactions can be inspirational and imaginative. Friends are in stronger focus, and long-term goals, wishes, and dreams are on the front burner. However, if you've felt left out or disappointed with friendships, this can also be emphasized. What's most important is that you're open to acknowledging your vulnerabilities so you can take a step closer to healing, repairing, and possibly strengthening relationships with others and yourself. Even the more complex problems in your relationships can be tackled now with an open, humble approach and realistic expectations.

Energy can be bursting at times today, dear Cancer, but it's not always easy to direct early today. Avoid rushing things until you know what you truly want, which can be something simpler than you expect. Early today, relationships can be a little confusing, just for the moment, as part of you craves intimacy and another part wants to take things as they come. You could be excited about learning or experiencing new things as you work towards your goals. Making plans can be a whole lot of fun right now, and it can involve redefining goals to make them more realistic and doable, a task that comes more naturally as the day progresses. There can be a stronger sense of accomplishment and even joy experienced as you meet your responsibilities. You're also in great shape to understand how to improve your career or reputation through work on vulnerabilities and insecurities as the Sun and Chiron head toward alignment at the top of your solar chart. It's time to discover--and embrace--your unique approach to taking the lead or managing others, and as you learn to do so, you'll find that people more readily see your value. Even so, if you are harboring insecurities about taking charge of your life and your responsibilities, these can be magnified now, but that brings you one step closer to self-understanding and healing.

Give ideas time to breathe and mature instead of rushing things today, dear Leo. Moderating your attention to different people and areas of life will bring the most satisfaction. As the day advances, this strategy comes more naturally. A key area of your life is likely to stabilize and strengthen. As well, joint projects, work behind the scenes, or counseling can be very beneficial now. Energies are also strong for sharing your thoughts with a special friend or partner. Openness and humility are encouraged, and you might intuitively arrive at an idea or plan that points you in an exciting new direction. As you face vulnerabilities, you may discover new avenues for expressing yourself. The need to venture outside the usual routine is motivating.

Cravings can be strong early today, dear Virgo,  but before going gung-ho about something, try to consider whether it will truly benefit you. Work on emotional self-control, but keep yourself busy, or you could become terribly moody without purposeful work to do. Fortunately, the day advances with smoother energy. It’s possible that an important project comes together. Transits now can strengthen a relationship and your resolve to pursue long-term goals. It’s an excellent period for brainstorming. You’re reaching out or throwing yourself into projects you enjoy. With an impending Sun-Chiron alignment also in play, the emotional and spiritual side of your relationships and interactions is in stronger focus. Healing situations and people seem to draw you in. You stand to learn much about your inner motives--it's easier to recognize how you naturally give and receive energy. Your ability to see beauty in imperfections can expand your intimate world, and an exceptionally open exchange is possible. Insecurities about dependencies or money matters may also come to the surface now, prompting you to make useful changes.

You want to make something more of what you have early today, and this can be a good thing, dear Libra, but some self-control and foresight will be helpful. As the day advances, you might thoroughly enjoy refining plans and goals so that they are more doable and meaningful to you, particularly with work, health, and self-improvement efforts. You can be busy and in demand, but things are coming together. As well, Chiron and the Sun are moving into alignment in your partnership sector, and cooperation comes easily and naturally. Openness seems the best way to bond. Your talents or unique traits may be in demand, and it can also be a good time for efforts toward a hobby or creative activity. You are especially willing to learn from and with others, and there can be significant realizations about your relationships or relationship needs. With more self-honesty, doors open to healing and growing.

Desires may not be about true wants early today, dear Scorpio. Improving your life doesn't have to involve pushing too far. Your ability to consider whether what you desire will benefit you down the road is a little compromised just for the time being, so be mindful and aim for self-knowledge before going all out. As the day advances, however, shouldering responsibilities feels good and natural, and even empowering. Connections made at this time in your life can be especially meaningful. The Sun and Chiron heading into alignment encourage an appreciation for human imperfection, giving us permission to be vulnerable. You're intuitively drawn to a new healing path or a work method that serves you exceptionally well. When it comes to health, the mind-body connection is a big focus. It's a good time to consider a new or improved health or fitness program, as you can be suddenly (and possibly uncomfortably) aware of a need to improve your self-care or health.

When it comes to activities early today, dear Sagittarius, even if you feel you have the energy to schedule a lot now, consider that energy levels may cool off later. Aim to be as moderate as you can. Overstating your feelings can lead to problems later. Relationships can be exciting but perhaps moody, as desires are big. Still, as the day advances, energies smooth out, but you maintain a strong desire to plan and work more enthusiastically towards your goals. You are learning a tremendous amount about yourself, and self-honesty is at the heart of this. It's also a good time to explore your romantic or creative needs openly and honestly. You may feel extra sensitive to feedback from others, but this can also increase your chance of more fully understanding your needs and vulnerabilities. An honest and compassionate look at your needs, particularly related to self-expression, leisure, children, and romance, can pull up opportunities to heal, grow, and improve.

A difference of opinion can turn into something much more than it should be early today, dear Capricorn. This can be a lively, creative day, however, particularly if you can pinpoint the desires that are coming from the heart. As the day progresses, there may be opportunities to strengthen a relationship in tangible ways. Transits now boost your communications and transportation systems. Your influence and powers of persuasion are enhanced, and your connections are both inspiring and practically supportive. It's also a time to give extra attention to your loved ones, home, and domestic routines. You're acknowledging your personal needs and insecurities. If you look for them, you'll discover opportunities to boost your relationships with family and those close to you, mainly through honest, direct, and open interactions, or to connect more deeply with yourself. Be willing to face uncomfortable feelings if it means improved self-understanding.

When it comes to projects and personal interests, as well as communications, you'll be very pleased with yourself later if you let ideas unfold naturally, dear Aquarius. Avoid pushing things today. As the day advances, patience comes more naturally. The magic ingredients for achievement are inspiration and effort right now. Your need to have meaningful work is strong and can fuel your success. You more readily shoulder your responsibilities, with an eye on expansion and growth as well. Problem-solving is in great favor, and you can be feeling quite self-motivated. Others find your ideas unique and even inspiring. Conversations and exchanges stir creative work, a hobby, or a fabulous idea. You have a stronger awareness of what's right for you with studies or personal interests, which can slowly but surely draw you in a new direction. You can present original ideas attractively, helping others open up in kind.

Early today, aim to avoid overscheduling with others when you actually need some time to yourself as well, dear Pisces. Aim to get in touch with yourself and your true needs. Expecting too much of your efforts can lead to dissatisfaction or a desire to give it all up. Don't overdo it, and you have the chance to truly enjoy yourself. As the day advances, it's easier to approach your world in a balanced manner. A powerful influence for taking an honest look at your needs also comes into play. With it, you more readily recognize your vulnerabilities surrounding money, income, and your talents. You might see practical matters in a whole new light or from an entirely different perspective. As you confront fears or insecurities about your abilities or earnings, you open up to new ways to heal, improve, and grow.
